ddls:
CREATE TABLE "image_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "memory_r" INTEGER /* Memory setting for the configuration */,
  "posterize_r" INTEGER /* Posterization setting for the configuration */,
  "gaussian_blur" INTEGER /* Gaussian blur setting for the configuration */,
  "thread" INTEGER /* Thread setting for the configuration */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality setting for the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_times" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for processing */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the output image */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to process the image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the image */,
  "system_spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system specification used for processing */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_times_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES image_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for processing */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during processing */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during processing */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage during processing */,
  "system_update_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system update that affected the performance metrics */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system notification related to the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES image_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used to process the image */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the image */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES image_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for processing */,
  "avg_time" REAL /* Average processing time for the configuration */,
  "min_time" REAL /* Minimum processing time for the configuration */,
  "max_time" REAL /* Maximum processing time for the configuration */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_stats_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES image_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system specification */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU model */,
  "memory" INTEGER /* Memory size */,
  "disk" INTEGER /* Disk size */,
  "spec_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the system specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error event */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_repository" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image stored in the repository */,
  "repo_date" TEXT /* Date the image was stored */,
  "repo_description" TEXT /* Description of the repository event */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_repository_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES image_metadata ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system configuration */,
  "system_spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system specification */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date the system configuration was set */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the system configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of system configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being processed */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing event */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit event occurred */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit event */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_audit_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES image_metadata ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_audit_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES image_processing_times ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "system_spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system specification */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the system update was applied */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the system update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of system update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system notification */,
  "system_spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system specification */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date the system notification was set */,
  "notif_description" TEXT /* Description of the system notification */,
  "notif_type" TEXT /* Type of system notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_notifications_system_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_spec_id") REFERENCES system_specs ("spec_id")
)
